steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content: Before the blank we have “three temporal” – a determiner plus adjective that needs a head noun. After the blank we see “that, through a patient and attentive cinematic eye, form tableaus…” – a relative clause (dependent clause) that will modify the noun we insert.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content:
The correct choice inserts the noun “spaces” followed directly by an opening parenthesis, with no punctuation before it, which properly sets off the nonrestrictive appositive giving examples.
The other three choices either insert a comma, an em dash, or a misplaced period before or after the parentheses, incorrectly treating the parenthetical as needing separation punctuation.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
